lesson: An incline with an angle θ rests next to a wall. Two balls are on the incline surface and are connected by a light string, as shown. The lower ball has mass m2 and is sliding down the incline surface, pulling the upper ball of mass m1. There is no friction between any of the surfaces, and the string is massless. Take g = 9.8 m/s^2. (a) Find atotal, the magnitude of the acceleration of the two balls. (b) Find T, the tension in the string.
